prompt: Create a deliberately clumsy, childlike doodle illustration on a plain white background of a cute ghost-like ninja mascot named Gold Mitama. The character is bright golden yellow, with a rounded floating ghost body, a curled wisp of hair on top, a tapering ghost tail curling to the left, and simple thick black uneven outlines. Draw it in an intentionally bad MS Paint scribble style: shaky jagged lines, uneven coloring, visible white gaps, rough marker-like scribbles, flat colors, no realistic shading, low-detail amateur fan-art energy. The mascot wears a black ninja headband across the forehead with a tied knot and two flapping black cloth ends on the left; the front plate is gray and contains exactly 3 small triangular black symbols. Give the face half-lidded green eyes and a bored expression, with a skewer of exactly 3 dango balls held horizontally in the mouth: pink, white, and green. Add a purple scarf around the neck, with a colorful chest emblem made of overlapping rainbow-like blocks of blue, cyan, yellow, red, and green. On the left side behind the character, place a small sheathed sword or short ninja weapon with a brown handle and purple wrapping. On the lower right, show the character holding exactly 1 gray four-point shuriken with a circular hole in the center. Keep the composition centered, square, playful, messy, and intentionally poorly drawn, like a funny rough doodle generated from text only.
